song.title: He Leadeth Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) He leadeth me! O blessed thought, O words with heav’nly comfort fraught; Whate’er I do, where’er I be, Still ’tis God’s hand that leadeth me.
[C] Chorus He leadeth me! He leadeth me! By His own hand He leadeth me; His faithful follower I would be, For by His hand He leadeth me.
[V2] 2) Sometimes ’mid scenes Of deepest gloom, Sometimes where Eden’s bowers bloom, By waters still, O’er troubled sea, Still ’tis His hand that leadeth me.
[V3] 3) Lord, I would clasp Thy hand in mine, Nor ever murmur or repine; Content, whatever lot I see, Since it is Thou that leadest me.
[V4] 4) And when my task on earth is done, When, by Thy grace, the vict’ry’s won, E’en death’s cold wave I will not flee, Since Thou in triumph leadest me.
song.author: Joseph h. Gilmore
